company: Evergy Kansas Metro, Inc. and Evergy Kansas Central, Inc.
company_raw: Evergy Kansas Metro, Inc. and Evergy Kansas Central, Inc.
source_note: Joint Motion to Approve Non-Unanimous Stipulation and Agreement (filed April 22, 2022) in the Kansas Corporation Commission's Investigation into Evergy Kansas Metro and Evergy Kansas Central regarding the February 2021 Winter Weather Events (Winter Storm Uri), Docket No. 21-EKME-329-GIE (contemplated by Docket 21-GIMX-303-MIS) — addressing the recovery and prudence of the extraordinary fuel and purchased-power costs Evergy incurred during the storm (21 pp). Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Kansas Corporation Commission eSTAR (estar.kcc.ks.gov/estar/ViewFile.aspx, document Id 54e98b5e-d9e2-4627-8355-b0c65b057bd9).
